content.json: # Entra Admin & Risky User Review Workbook

parameters.name: Workspace
parameters.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| order by name asc
| summarize Selected = makelist(id, 10), All = makelist(id, 1000)
| mvexpand All limit 1000
| project value = tostring(All), label = tostring(All), selected = iff(Selected contains All, true, false)
| where value !contains "DefaultW"

content.json:
Entra Admin & Risky User Review Workbook

📖 Overview

This Azure Sentinel Workbook provides a comprehensive suite of tools for security analysts to proactively review and investigate administrative and risky user behavior within Microsoft Entra ID. It correlates data from multiple Microsoft security services to build a detailed picture of user activity, helping to bridge the gap between separate admin accounts and their corresponding contact users.

The workbook is designed to be interactive, allowing you to select an admin or a risky user and pivot to their detailed activity, including sign-in timelines, related incidents, associated devices, PIM history, and Azure administrative actions.

⚙️ Prerequisites

For the workbook to function correctly, your Log Analytics Workspace must be collecting data from the following sources:

  • Microsoft Entra ID:
    • SigninLogs
    • AuditLogs
    • IdentityInfo (from Microsoft Defender for Identity)
  • Microsoft Sentinel:
    • BehaviorAnalytics (UEBA)
    • SecurityIncident
    • SecurityAlert
  • Microsoft Defender for Endpoint (MDE):
    • DeviceLogonEvents
    • DeviceInfo
  • Azure:
    • AzureActivity

Note: Some widgets or tabs may appear empty if the corresponding data tables are not available in your workspace.

🔑 Key Features & Tabs

The workbook is organized into four main tabs, each designed for a specific investigative purpose.

1. Admin Review

This tab is the primary dashboard for auditing administrative accounts.

  • Initial View: It begins by listing all admin accounts that have been active in the last 90 days.
  • Deep Dive: By selecting an admin from the list, you can populate a series of detailed views, including:
    • Potential contact user accounts based on naming conventions.
    • A timeline of recent sign-in activity.
    • Related security incidents and alerts.
    • On-premises identity information from MDI.
    • Unusual behaviors flagged by Sentinel UEBA.
    • Associated devices from MDE.
    • Privileged Identity Management (PIM) activation history.
    • Azure administrative activity from the Azure Activity Log.

2. Risky User Review

This tab applies a similar investigative pattern to users that have been flagged as "risky" by Entra ID Protection.

  • Focus: The goal is to quickly determine if a compromised or risky user has performed any administrative activity or warrants a deeper investigation.
  • Default Filters: It defaults to showing users with recent pre-authentication risk factors who have also had successful sign-ins, making it a powerful tool for hunting compromised accounts.

3. Admin Contact Lookup

This tab provides a utility to help identify the primary user account associated with a separate, dedicated admin account.

  • Best Practice: While it's recommended to record the contact user in the "alternative contact" field of the admin account's properties in Entra ID, this is not always done.
  • Solution: This lookup uses naming similarities to find probable matches, helping you connect with the correct person responsible for an admin account.

4. PIM Activity Review

This section offers a focused view of Privileged Identity Management (PIM) usage across your environment.

  • Insights: It helps you understand who is using PIM, which roles are being activated, and how often.
  • Hidden Patterns: It specifically surfaces the "justification" comments provided during PIM activation, which are often difficult to review and analyze in the Azure portal, allowing you to spot patterns or non-compliance.

content.query:
let adminSignins = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(90d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserPrincipalName
| where UserPrincipalName contains "{Search}"
| extend username = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName, "@")[0])
| extend nameParts = split(username, ".")
| extend firstName = tostring(nameParts[0])
| extend lastName = tostring(nameParts[-2])
| extend compare = strcat(firstName, lastName)
| extend compare = translate("-", "", compare)
| extend compare = replace(@"[0-9]", "", compare)
| project Admin_UPN=UserPrincipalName, Admin_DisplayName=Identity, compare;
let nonAdminSignins = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(90d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserPrincipalName
| where UserPrincipalName !contains "{Search}"
| extend username = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName, "@")[0])
| extend nameParts = split(username, ".")
| extend firstName = tostring(nameParts[0])
| extend lastName = iif(strlen(nameParts[1]) == 1, tostring(nameParts[2]), tostring(nameParts[1]))
| extend compare = strcat(firstName, lastName)
| extend compare = translate("-", "", compare)
| extend compare = replace(@"[0-9]", "", compare)
| project User_UPN=UserPrincipalName, User_DisplayName=Identity, compare;
adminSignins
| join kind=leftouter (
nonAdminSignins
) on compare
| summarize Correlated_User_UPNs = make_list(User_UPN) by Admin_UPN, Admin_DisplayName
| project 
    Admin_DisplayName,
    Admin_UPN, 
    Count = array_length(Correlated_User_UPNs),
    Sample_User = Correlated_User_UPNs[0],
    Correlated_User_UPNs
content.title: Attempting to Map Admin-to-User Over 90-Days

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago (90d)
| where ResultSignature == "SUCCESS"
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserPrincipalName
| where UserPrincipalName contains "{Search}"
| extend State = LocationDetails.state
| extend City = LocationDetails.city
| extend DeviceName = DeviceDetail.displayName
| extend FirstName = split(Identity, " ").[0]
| extend LastName = split(Identity, " ").[-2]  //Update to match your naming pattern
| extend UPN_Prefix = split(UserPrincipalName, "{Search}").[0] //Update to match your naming pattern
| extend UPN_Prefix2 = split(UserPrincipalName, "@").[0] 
| project LastSeen=TimeGenerated, DisplayName=Identity, UserPrincipalName, UserId, Country=Location, State, City, DeviceName, IPAddress, FirstName, LastName, UPN_Prefix, UPN_Prefix2
content.title: Admin Users - 90-Days Last Seen (Select for Details)

content.query:
let adminSignins = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(90d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserPrincipalName
| where UserPrincipalName contains "{Search}"
| extend username = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName, "@")[0])
| extend nameParts = split(username, ".")
| extend firstName = tostring(nameParts[0])
| extend lastName = tostring(nameParts[-2])
| extend compare = strcat(firstName, lastName)
| extend compare = translate("-", "", compare)
| extend compare = replace(@"[0-9]", "", compare)
| project Admin_UPN=UserPrincipalName, Admin_DisplayName=Identity, compare;
let nonAdminSignins = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(90d)
| where UserPrincipalName !contains "{Search}"
| extend UPN_Prefix2 = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName, "@")[0])
| extend nameParts = split(UPN_Prefix2, ".")
| extend firstName = tostring(nameParts[0])
| extend lastName = iif(strlen(nameParts[1]) == 1, tostring(nameParts[2]), tostring(nameParts[1]))
| extend compare = strcat(firstName, lastName)
| extend compare = translate("-", "", compare)
| extend compare = replace(@"[0-9]", "", compare)
| project 
    compare,
    TimeGenerated, 
    DisplayName=Identity, 
    UserPrincipalName, 
    UserId, 
    Country=Location, 
    State=tostring(LocationDetails.state), 
    City=tostring(LocationDetails.city), 
    DeviceName=tostring(DeviceDetail.displayName), 
    IPAddress, UPN_Prefix2;
adminSignins
| join kind=leftouter (
    nonAdminSignins
) on compare
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserPrincipalName
| project 
    LastSeen=TimeGenerated,
    Admin_DisplayName,   
    User_DisplayName=DisplayName, 
    User_Email=UserPrincipalName, 
    Country, 
    State, 
    City, 
    DeviceName, 
    IPAddress, Admin_UPN, UPN_Prefix2
| where Admin_UPN == "{UserPrincipalName}"
content.title: Potential Contact User Account (Select for Details)

items.name: Potential Contact User Account (Select for Details)

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago (90d)
| where UserPrincipalName == "{UserPrincipalName}"
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), Status=ResultSignature
content.title: User Signin History (90 Days + Time Brush)

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where UserPrincipalName == "{UserPrincipalName}"
| extend State = LocationDetails.state
| extend City = LocationDetails.city
| extend DeviceName = DeviceDetail.displayName
| extend Browser = DeviceDetail.browser
| extend OS = DeviceDetail.operatingSystem
| extend NetworkType = parse_json(NetworkLocationDetails)[1].networkType
| extend Network = parse_json(tostring(parse_json(NetworkLocationDetails)[1].networkNames))[0]
| extend icon = ResultSignature
| project TimeGenerated, ['🚪Signin']=icon, Status=ResultSignature, RiskState, AppDisplayName, DisplayName=Identity, UserPrincipalName, UserId, UserType, Country=Location, State, City, DeviceName, OS, Browser, IPAddress, Network, NetworkType, MFA=AuthenticationRequirement, CA_Status=ConditionalAccessStatus
content.title: User Signin History

content.query:
let IncidentAlerts = SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, * ) by IncidentName
| mv-expand todynamic(AlertIds)
| extend AlertId = tostring(AlertIds)
| project TimeGenerated, Status, Severity, Title, ProviderName, IncidentUrl, AlertId;
let AlertEntities = SecurityAlert 
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, * ) by SystemAlertId
| where Entities contains "account"
| mv-expand todynamic(Entities)
| where Entities.Type == 'account'
| extend AccountName = tostring(Entities.Name)
| where AccountName == "{UPN_Prefix2}"
| project TimeGenerated, AccountName, SystemAlertId;
IncidentAlerts
| join kind=inner AlertEntities on $left.AlertId == $right.SystemAlertId
| project-away TimeGenerated1, AlertId, SystemAlertId, AccountName
| sort by TimeGenerated
content.title: Related Incident History (30 Days)
content.noDataMessage: No recent incidents for this user

content.query:
IdentityInfo
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AccountUPN
| where AccountUPN == "{UserPrincipalName}"
| extend RiskLevel = tostring(iif(isempty( RiskLevel), "Unknown", RiskLevel))
| extend RiskState = tostring(iif(isempty( RiskState), "Unknown", RiskState))
| mv-expand todynamic(GroupMembership)
| mv-expand todynamic(AssignedRoles)
| project TimeGenerated, AccountDisplayName, RiskLevel, RiskState, Enabled=IsAccountEnabled, UserType, GroupMembership, AssignedRoles, Department, JobTitle, StreetAddress, Country, State, City, Phone
content.title: Identity & Role Details
content.noDataMessage: No IdentityInfo data for this user (AD centric log)

content.query:
BehaviorAnalytics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(9d)
| where UserPrincipalName == "{UserPrincipalName}"
| extend Uncommon = tostring(ActivityInsights.ActionUncommonlyPerformedByUser)
| extend HighVolume = tostring(ActivityInsights.UncommonHighVolumeOfActions)
| where Uncommon == "True" or HighVolume == "True" //remove to see all
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, Priority=InvestigationPriority, Uncommon, HighVolume, ActionType, ActivityType, EventSource, SourceDevice, SourceIPAddress, SourceIPLocation
| sort by TimeGenerated
content.title: Possible Unusual Behavior (90 Days)
content.noDataMessage: No unusual behaviors detected by Sentinel

content.query:
let baseUrl = "https://security.microsoft.us"; // Change to "https://security.microsoft.us" for government clouds
DeviceLogonEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(60d)
| where AccountName == "{UserPrincipalName}"
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| join (
    DeviceInfo
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
) on DeviceId
| join kind=leftouter (
    AlertEvidence
    | where DeviceId != ""
    | summarize AlertCount = dcount(AlertId) by DeviceId
) on DeviceId
| project
    LastSeen = TimeGenerated,
    DeviceName,
    OSPlatform,
    AlertCount = todouble(AlertCount),
    MDE_Onboarding = OnboardingStatus,
    MDE_Status = SensorHealthState,
    ExposureLevel,
    PublicIP,
    DeviceProfileUrl = strcat(baseUrl, "/machines/", DeviceId),
    DeviceId | order by LastSeen
content.title: Related Device Activity (60 Days)
content.noDataMessage: No devices detected for this user (good for admins)

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where OperationName contains "requested (PIM activation)"
//| where Result == "success"
| extend UPN = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| extend Role0 = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
| extend Role1 = tostring(TargetResources[1].displayName)
| extend Role3 = tostring(TargetResources[3].displayName)
| mv-expand AD = AdditionalDetails
| extend ADKey = tostring(AD.key), ADValue = tostring(AD.value)
| summarize
    CommentFromDetails = anyif(ADValue, ADKey =~ "Justification"),
    Source_IP = anyif(ADValue, ADKey =~ "ipaddr")
    by TimeGenerated, Identity, UPN, Category, Result, OperationName, ResultDescription, Role0, Role1, Role3
| extend Comment = iff(Category == "GroupManagement", ResultDescription, CommentFromDetails)
| extend Role = case(
    Category == "GroupManagement" and isnotempty(Role1), Role1,
    Role0 == "Member" and isnotempty(Role3), Role3,
    isnotempty(Role1) and isempty(Role0), Role1,
    Role0
)
| project TimeGenerated, Identity, UPN, Role, Category, Comment, Source_IP, Result
| where UPN == "{UserPrincipalName}"
content.title: PIM Request History
content.noDataMessage: No PIM activity detected for this user

content.query:
AzureActivity
| where Caller == "{UserPrincipalName}"
| where ActivityStatusValue == "Success"
| extend Action = parse_json(Properties).message
| extend Resource = parse_json(Properties).resource
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, OperationNameValue, Action, ResourceGroup, SubscriptionId, CallerIpAddress, Resource, _ResourceId
content.title: Azure Activity
content.noDataMessage: No Azure changes detected for this user

parameters.name: RiskTIme
parameters.label: Risk Lookback
parameters.description: How far back to look for user risk flags

parameters.name: Method
parameters.label: Verification Method

parameters.name: CA_Status
parameters.description: Conditional access applied to successfull signin results

content.query:
let UserRisk = SigninLogs
| where ResultType != 0
| extend Method = tostring(parse_json(AuthenticationDetails)[0].authenticationMethod)
| where RiskState in ({RiskState}) or RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ({RiskLevel}) or Method in ({Method})
| where UserPrincipalName contains "@"
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserPrincipalName;
let Success = SigninLogs
| where ResultType == 0 //Success
| where UserType in ({UserType})
| where ConditionalAccessStatus in ({CA_Status})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserPrincipalName;
UserRisk
| join kind=rightantisemi Success on UserPrincipalName
| extend State = LocationDetails.state
| extend City = LocationDetails.city
| extend DeviceName = DeviceDetail.displayName
| extend FirstName = split(UserPrincipalName, ".").[0]
| extend LastName = split(UserPrincipalName, ".").[1]
| extend LastName = iif(strlen(split(UserPrincipalName, ".").[1]) > 1, split(UserPrincipalName, ".").[1], split(UserPrincipalName, ".").[2])
| extend Verification = tostring(parse_json(AuthenticationDetails)[0].authenticationMethod)
| extend UPN_Prefix = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName, "@").[0])
| extend Key = tostring(parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)[0].key)
| extend isCrossTenant = iif(CrossTenantAccessType == "none", "tenant_local", CrossTenantAccessType)
| extend MFA_Type = iif(AuthenticationRequirement == "multiFactorAuthentication", "multiFactor", "singleFactor") 
| extend UserType = iif(isempty( UserType), CrossTenantAccessType, UserType)
| project TimeGenerated, Result=ResultSignature,DisplayName=Identity, UserPrincipalName, UserId, UserType, RiskState, SignInRisk=RiskLevelDuringSignIn, Verification,CA_Status=ConditionalAccessStatus, isCrossTenant, MFA_Type, Key, Country=Location, State, City, DeviceName, IPAddress, FirstName, LastName, UPN_Prefix
content.title: Successful but Recent Risky or Weak Auth Signins (Select for Details)

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(90d)
| where UserPrincipalName == "{UserPrincipalName}"
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), Status=ResultSignature
content.title: User Signin History (90 Days + Time Brush)

items.name: User Signin History (90 Days + Time Brush)

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where UserPrincipalName == "{UserPrincipalName}"
| extend State = LocationDetails.state
| extend City = LocationDetails.city
| extend DeviceName = DeviceDetail.displayName
| extend Browser = DeviceDetail.browser
| extend OS = DeviceDetail.operatingSystem
| extend UPN_Prefix2 = split(UserPrincipalName, "@").[0]
| extend NetworkType = parse_json(NetworkLocationDetails)[1].networkType
| extend Network = parse_json(tostring(parse_json(NetworkLocationDetails)[1].networkNames))[0]
| extend MFA_Type = iif(AuthenticationRequirement == "multiFactorAuthentication", "multiFactor", "singleFactor") 
| extend icon = ResultSignature
| extend isCrossTenant = iif(CrossTenantAccessType == "none", "tenant_local", CrossTenantAccessType)
| extend Verification = tostring(parse_json(AuthenticationDetails)[0].authenticationMethod)
| extend Key = tostring(parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)[0].key)
| project TimeGenerated, ['🚪Signin']=icon, Status=ResultSignature, RiskState, DisplayName=Identity, UserPrincipalName, UserId, UserType, MFA_Type, CA_Status=ConditionalAccessStatus, Verification, isCrossTenant, Key, AppDisplayName, Country=Location, State, City, DeviceName, OS, Browser, IPAddress, Network, NetworkType
content.title: User Signin History

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where UserPrincipalName startswith "{UPN_Prefix}" or (Identity contains "{FirstName}" and Identity contains "{LastName}")
| extend UPN_Prefix = split(UserPrincipalName, "@").[0]
| extend UPN_Prefix = split(UPN_Prefix, ".").[-1]
//| where UPN_Prefix != "admin"
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserPrincipalName
| extend State = LocationDetails.state
| extend City = LocationDetails.city
| extend DeviceName = DeviceDetail.displayName
| project TimeGenerated, DisplayName=Identity, UserPrincipalName, UserId, Country=Location, State, City, DeviceName, IPAddress
content.title: Similar User Accounts

content.query:
let IncidentAlerts = SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, * ) by IncidentName
| mv-expand todynamic(AlertIds)
| extend AlertId = tostring(AlertIds)
| project TimeGenerated, Status, Severity, Title, ProviderName, IncidentUrl, AlertId;
let AlertEntities = SecurityAlert 
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, * ) by SystemAlertId
| where Entities contains "account"
| mv-expand todynamic(Entities)
| where Entities.Type == 'account'
| extend AccountName = tostring(Entities.Name)
| where AccountName == "{UPN_Prefix}"
| project TimeGenerated, AccountName, SystemAlertId;
IncidentAlerts
| join kind=inner AlertEntities on $left.AlertId == $right.SystemAlertId
| project-away TimeGenerated1, AlertId, SystemAlertId, AccountName
| sort by TimeGenerated
content.title: Related Incident History (30 Days)
content.noDataMessage: No recent incidents for this user

content.query:
IdentityInfo
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AccountUPN
| where AccountUPN == "{UserPrincipalName}"
| extend RiskLevel = tostring(iif(isempty( RiskLevel), "Unknown", RiskLevel))
| extend RiskState = tostring(iif(isempty( RiskState), "Unknown", RiskState))
| mv-expand todynamic(GroupMembership)
| mv-expand todynamic(AssignedRoles)
| project TimeGenerated, AccountDisplayName, RiskLevel, RiskState, Enabled=IsAccountEnabled, UserType, GroupMembership, AssignedRoles, Department, JobTitle, StreetAddress, Country, State, City, Phone
content.title: Identity & Role Details
content.noDataMessage: No IdentityInfo data for this user (AD centric log)

content.query:
BehaviorAnalytics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(9d)
| where UserPrincipalName == "{UserPrincipalName}"
| extend Uncommon = tostring(ActivityInsights.ActionUncommonlyPerformedByUser)
| extend HighVolume = tostring(ActivityInsights.UncommonHighVolumeOfActions)
| where Uncommon == "True" or HighVolume == "True" //remove to see all
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, Priority=InvestigationPriority, Uncommon, HighVolume, ActionType, ActivityType, EventSource, SourceDevice, SourceIPAddress, SourceIPLocation
| sort by TimeGenerated
content.title: Possible Unusual Behavior (90 Days)
content.noDataMessage: No unusual behaviors detected by Sentinel

content.query:
let baseUrl = "https://security.microsoft.us"; // Change to "https://security.microsoft.us" for government clouds
DeviceLogonEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(60d)
| where AccountName == "{UserPrincipalName}"
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| join (
    DeviceInfo
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
) on DeviceId
| join kind=leftouter (
    AlertEvidence
    | where DeviceId != ""
    | summarize AlertCount = dcount(AlertId) by DeviceId
) on DeviceId
| project
    LastSeen = TimeGenerated,
    DeviceName,
    OSPlatform,
    AlertCount = todouble(AlertCount),
    MDE_Onboarding = OnboardingStatus,
    MDE_Status = SensorHealthState,
    ExposureLevel,
    PublicIP,
    DeviceProfileUrl = strcat(baseUrl, "/machines/", DeviceId),
    DeviceId | order by LastSeen
content.title: Related Device Activity (60 Days)
content.noDataMessage: No devices detected for this user

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where OperationName contains "requested (PIM activation)"
//| where Result == "success"
| extend UPN = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| extend Role0 = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
| extend Role1 = tostring(TargetResources[1].displayName)
| extend Role3 = tostring(TargetResources[3].displayName)
| mv-expand AD = AdditionalDetails
| extend ADKey = tostring(AD.key), ADValue = tostring(AD.value)
| summarize
    CommentFromDetails = anyif(ADValue, ADKey =~ "Justification"),
    Source_IP = anyif(ADValue, ADKey =~ "ipaddr")
    by TimeGenerated, Identity, UPN, Category, Result, OperationName, ResultDescription, Role0, Role1, Role3
| extend Comment = iff(Category == "GroupManagement", ResultDescription, CommentFromDetails)
| extend Role = case(
    Category == "GroupManagement" and isnotempty(Role1), Role1,
    Role0 == "Member" and isnotempty(Role3), Role3,
    isnotempty(Role1) and isempty(Role0), Role1,
    Role0
)
| project TimeGenerated, Identity, UPN, Role, Category, Comment, Source_IP, Result
| where UPN == "{UserPrincipalName}"
content.title: PIM Request History
content.noDataMessage: No PIM activity detected for this user (Admin Activity)

content.query:
AzureActivity
| where Caller == "{UserPrincipalName}"
| where ActivityStatusValue == "Success"
| extend Action = parse_json(Properties).message
| extend Resource = parse_json(Properties).resource
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, OperationNameValue, Action, ResourceGroup, SubscriptionId, CallerIpAddress, Resource, _ResourceId
content.title: Azure Admin Activity
content.noDataMessage: No Azure changes detected for this user (Admin Activity)

parameters.name: Roles
parameters.label: Roles & Groups
parameters.query:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(90d)
| where OperationName contains "requested (PIM activation)"
| where Result == "success"
| extend UPN = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| extend Role0 = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
| extend Role1 = tostring(TargetResources[1].displayName)
| extend Role3 = tostring(TargetResources[3].displayName)
| mv-expand AD = AdditionalDetails
| extend ADKey = tostring(AD.key), ADValue = tostring(AD.value)
| summarize
    CommentFromDetails = anyif(ADValue, ADKey =~ "Justification"),
    Source_IP = anyif(ADValue, ADKey =~ "ipaddr")
    by TimeGenerated, Identity, UPN, Category, Result, OperationName, ResultDescription, Role0, Role1, Role3
| extend Comment = iff(Category == "GroupManagement", ResultDescription, CommentFromDetails)
| extend Role = case(
    Category == "GroupManagement" and isnotempty(Role1), Role1,
    Role0 == "Member" and isnotempty(Role3), Role3,
    isnotempty(Role1) and isempty(Role0), Role1,
    Role0
)
| project TimeGenerated, Identity, UPN, Role, Category, Comment, Source_IP, Result
| summarize by Role | sort by Role asc

parameters.name: Category
parameters.query:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where OperationName contains "requested (PIM activation)"
| where Result == "success"
| summarize by Category

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(90d)
| where OperationName contains "requested (PIM activation)"
| extend Result = "Activated"
| extend UPN = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| extend Role0 = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
| extend Role1 = tostring(TargetResources[1].displayName)
| extend Role3 = tostring(TargetResources[3].displayName)
| mv-expand AD = AdditionalDetails
| extend ADKey = tostring(AD.key), ADValue = tostring(AD.value)
| summarize
    CommentFromDetails = anyif(ADValue, ADKey =~ "Justification"),
    Source_IP = anyif(ADValue, ADKey =~ "ipaddr")
    by TimeGenerated, Identity, UPN, Category, Result, OperationName, ResultDescription, Role0, Role1, Role3
| extend Comment = iff(Category == "GroupManagement", ResultDescription, CommentFromDetails)
| extend Role = case(
    Category == "GroupManagement" and isnotempty(Role1), Role1,
    Role0 == "Member" and isnotempty(Role3), Role3,
    isnotempty(Role1) and isempty(Role0), Role1,
    Role0
)
| project TimeGenerated, Identity, UPN, Role, Category, Comment, Source_IP, Result
| where Role in ({Roles})
| where Category in ({Category})
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Result
content.title: PIM Activity TImeline (90 Days)

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where OperationName contains "requested (PIM activation)"
| where Result == "success"
| extend UPN = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| extend Role0 = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
| extend Role1 = tostring(TargetResources[1].displayName)
| extend Role3 = tostring(TargetResources[3].displayName)
| mv-expand AD = AdditionalDetails
| extend ADKey = tostring(AD.key), ADValue = tostring(AD.value)
| summarize
    CommentFromDetails = anyif(ADValue, ADKey =~ "Justification"),
    Source_IP = anyif(ADValue, ADKey =~ "ipaddr")
    by TimeGenerated, Identity, UPN, Category, Result, OperationName, ResultDescription, Role0, Role1, Role3
| extend Comment = iff(Category == "GroupManagement", ResultDescription, CommentFromDetails)
| extend Role = case(
    Category == "GroupManagement" and isnotempty(Role1), Role1,
    Role0 == "Member" and isnotempty(Role3), Role3,
    isnotempty(Role1) and isempty(Role0), Role1,
    Role0
)
| extend Role = tostring(Role)
| where Role in ({Roles})
| where Category in ({Category})
| project TimeGenerated, Identity, UPN, Role, Category, Comment, Source_IP, Result
content.title: Successful PIM Request Activity

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(60d)
| where OperationName contains "requested (PIM activation)"
| where Result == "success"
| extend UPN = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| extend Role0 = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
| extend Role1 = tostring(TargetResources[1].displayName)
| extend Role3 = tostring(TargetResources[3].displayName)
| mv-expand AD = AdditionalDetails
| extend ADKey = tostring(AD.key), ADValue = tostring(AD.value)
| summarize
    CommentFromDetails = anyif(ADValue, ADKey =~ "Justification"),
    Source_IP = anyif(ADValue, ADKey =~ "ipaddr")
    by TimeGenerated, Identity, UPN, Category, Result, OperationName, ResultDescription, Role0, Role1, Role3
| extend Comment = iff(Category == "GroupManagement", ResultDescription, CommentFromDetails)
| extend Role = case(
    Category == "GroupManagement" and isnotempty(Role1), Role1,
    Role0 == "Member" and isnotempty(Role3), Role3,
    isnotempty(Role1) and isempty(Role0), Role1,
    Role0
)
| project TimeGenerated, Identity, UPN, Role, Category, Comment, Source_IP, Result
| summarize count() by Identity, Role, Comment
| where Role in ({Roles})
content.title: PIM Activity - Count by Role & Comment (60 Days)

items.name: PIM Activity - Count by Role & Comment (60 Days)

content.query:
let PIMBase =
    AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(720d)
    | where OperationName contains "requested (PIM activation)"
    | where Result == "success"
    | extend UPN = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
    | extend Role0 = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
    | extend Role1 = tostring(TargetResources[1].displayName)
    | extend Role3 = tostring(TargetResources[3].displayName)
    | mv-expand AD = AdditionalDetails
    | extend ADKey = tostring(AD.key), ADValue = tostring(AD.value)
    | summarize
        CommentFromDetails = anyif(ADValue, ADKey =~ "Justification"),
        Source_IP = anyif(ADValue, ADKey =~ "ipaddr")
        by TimeGenerated, Identity, UPN, Category, Result, OperationName, ResultDescription, Role0, Role1, Role3
    | extend Comment = iff(Category == "GroupManagement", ResultDescription, CommentFromDetails)
    | extend Role = case(
        Category == "GroupManagement" and isnotempty(Role1), Role1,
        Role0 == "Member" and isnotempty(Role3), Role3,
        isnotempty(Role1) and isempty(Role0), Role1,
        Role0
    )
    | where isnotempty(UPN)
    | project TimeGenerated, Identity, UPN, Role, Category, Comment, Source_IP, Result;
let PIMHistory90d =
    PIMBase
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(90d) .. ago(24h))
    | summarize
        HistoricalRequestCount = count(),
        HistoricalRequests = make_list(
            bag_pack(
                "TimeGenerated", TimeGenerated,
                "Identity", Identity,
                "UPN", UPN,
                "Role", Role,
                "Category", Category,
                "Comment", Comment,
                "Source_IP", Source_IP,
                "Result", Result
            ),
            1000
        )
    // Group by both Identity and UPN
    by Identity, UPN;
let RecentPIM24h =
    PIMBase
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
    | summarize
        RecentRequestCount = count(),
        MostRecentRequest = max(TimeGenerated),
        RecentRequests = make_list(
            bag_pack(
                "TimeGenerated", TimeGenerated,
                "Identity", Identity,
                "UPN", UPN,
                "Role", Role,
                "Category", Category,
                "Comment", Comment,
                "Source_IP", Source_IP,
                "Result", Result
            ),
            100
        )
    // Group by both Identity and UPN
    by Identity, UPN;
RecentPIM24h
// Join on UPN, as Identity should be consistent per UPN
| join kind=leftouter PIMHistory90d on UPN
| project
    Identity, // Added Identity to the final output
    UPN,
    MostRecentRequest,
    RecentCount=RecentRequestCount,
    RecentRequests,
    HistoricalCount = coalesce(HistoricalRequestCount, 0),
    HistoricalRequests
| order by  HistoricalCount desc
content.title: PIM Activity - Historic Activity Review
